scripts.build: npm run content:check && node build.mjs && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./tailwind.css -o ./dist/assets/main.css --minify
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.deploy: npm run build && rm -rf ../public_html && cp -R dist ../public_html && echo '\n✓ public_html hazir → FileZilla ile ../public_html icindekileri sunucudaki public_html e yukle'
